# Achievement Hub

Achievement Hub is a web application that lets users connect their Steam account, track games, achievements, completion progress, and leaderboard rankings.

## Main pages

- [Home](https://achievementhub.org/)
- [Register](https://achievementhub.org/register)
- [Login](https://achievementhub.org/login)
- [Leaderboard](https://achievementhub.org/leaderboard)
- [Privacy Policy](https://achievementhub.org/privacy)
- [Terms of Service](https://achievementhub.org/terms)
